location: Starting equipment for the Prophet class. Also an uncommon drop (about 2%) from sword-and-shield demi-humans found across several regions — a reliable base-game farm spot is the group of four demi-humans found between the Forest Lookout Tower and South of the Lookout Tower Sites of Grace in Weeping Peninsula. Another group carrying it sits on a cliff guarded by a Rune Bear, northwest of Mistwood Ruins in Limgrave.
tactics: The Weeping Peninsula camp has four demi-humans fighting together, several carrying this shield — expect a small group fight, not a lone enemy.
The Limgrave alternative near Mistwood is guarded by a Rune Bear, a much bigger threat than the demi-human corpses sitting near it.
At 1.0 weight, it's the lightest small shield in the game — its appeal is equip-load efficiency, not its block stats.
lore: A creaky old wooden shield crudely bound together with vines. The item's own in-game text jokes that it's barely worth equipping given how many better shields are readily available.

builds.name: Featherweight parry build
builds.why: Its negligible 1.0 weight makes it ideal for a dagger/bleed dual-wield build that wants a Parry option without sacrificing much equip load.
